reasoning: Peru's probability of winning the 2026 FIFA World Cup is essentially zero. A team's underlying chance of winning a World Cup depends strongly on elite talent, and historically only powerhouse nations (e.g., Brazil, Argentina, France) take the title. Peru has never won the tournament. Furthermore, into late 2024 and 2025 CONMEBOL qualifying, Peru has struggled immensely, spending most of the campaign at the bottom of the table. It is highly unlikely that they will even qualify for the 48-team tournament, let alone win it. The market prices this event at ~0.00%. To respect the minimum parameter constraints, I am forecasting 0.02 (2%), the absolute minimum allowed.
